earnings_cp.note: Cp = realized AI quasi-rents / user cost of installed stock. Realized K-holder AI revenue only; guidance excluded. Corners span delta x margin. Levels uncertain to a factor of several - watch the trajectory.

benefit_cs.note: Social return: time saved/work improved valued against user cost, at 10y and 30y horizons. Bounded estimate with biases in both directions; gross of harms (see electricity-price and layoff indicators). NOT a floor.

fragility_f.note: F = location-weighted external-finance dependence of the build, plus a circularity penalty. Hedge (cash-funded) < 0.33 < speculative < 0.66 < Ponzi. The centre is solid; fragility concentrates at the neocloud edge.
